_provenance.notes: Single-page (home) extraction; cross-page aggregation scope is the home page only. Palette/type/motif modes therefore carry home-page bias by construction (the --single contract). OneTrust consent-center colors (#0094d3 banner buttons, #3860be filter, #efefef) and headings were filtered before aggregation. Type scale measured at 1440x900: 42/34/22px headings, all Metropolis 700. CSS var --brandColor:#0094d4 confirms the role-primary cluster.

Wordmark img renders at 0x0 in the desktop header slot at measurement time (CSS-driven responsive swap with the small mediclinic icon-logo); failed the locator's height>=32/width>=40 rendered-size gate. Resolved via locator chain step 2 by identity (src contains 'logo', alt='Hirslanden', inside div#nav) and fetched directly from https://www.hirslanden.ch/content/dam/corporate/logos/hirslanden/hirslanden-logo.png. Intrinsic 188x54 (aspect 3.48 wordmark). A combined mark 'icon-hirslanden-mediclinic-web.png' (60x50) also present (group identity with Mediclinic). Only one logo variant captured.

palette._provenance: warm off-white; the page ground beneath the white cards. Pill chips (Jobs/Aerztesuche) use the near-identical rgb(247,247,246).
Hirslanden blue. Confirmed by CSS custom property --brandColor:#0094d4. Primary action color: search button, 'Zu den Standorten' CTA, the Hirslanden Blog band, carousel active dot, eyebrow badges.
10% tint of primary; quick-link tile backgrounds. Confirmed by CSS var --brandColorOpacity:rgba(0,148,212,0.1).
warm dark taupe-grey; body and most heading text. Not pure black — a deliberate warm neutral.
emergency red, footer 'Notfallnummer 144' label only. The single saturated warm accent in an otherwise blue/neutral system; reserved for emergency wayfinding.

headingFamily.name: Metropolis
headingFamily._provenance: All headings Metropolis 700. h1 42px (rendered uppercase via CSS as hero watermark, color #938880 lighter-title); h2 34px #534c46; h3 22px #534c46. Line-heights ~1.4 (loose for a display register).

bodyFamily.name: Metropolis
bodyFamily._provenance: Body Metropolis 400/500. 16px/1.63 for prose, 13px for dense meta (clinic names, dates). Single-family system — Metropolis carries headings, body, labels, and UI chrome.

scaleAudit._provenance: Heading sizes 42 -> 34 -> 22px. 42/34 = 1.235 (~major-third) but 34/22 = 1.545 (~perfect-fifth). Ratios disagree by more than 0.025, so the scale is ad-hoc, not modular.

files.sourceCssRule: @font-face { font-family: 'Metropolis'; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; src: url('frontend-min/resources/font/Metropolis-Regular.woff') format('woff'); }
@font-face { font-family: 'Metropolis'; font-weight: 500; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; src: url('frontend-min/resources/font/Metropolis-SemiBold.woff') format('woff'); }
@font-face { font-family: 'Metropolis'; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; src: url('frontend-min/resources/font/Metropolis-Bold.woff') format('woff'); }

type._provenance: licensingFlag 'open': Metropolis is a free/open-source geometric sans (Chris Simpson, SIL OFL). Italic cuts (Regular/SemiBold/Bold Italic) also declared in @font-face but not fetched on this load.

spacing._provenance: No coherent spacing scale exposed at :root (only --brandColor and --brandColorOpacity are defined). Section paddings are component-driven (legacy AEM), not tokenized. baseUnit null and scale empty are themselves a signal: the migration target will introduce a spacing system.

occurrences.18px: dominant (page wrapper, pill chips, search box)

borderRadius._provenance: 18px is the signature radius: pill chips (Jobs/Aerztesuche/Baby-Galerie), the search box, the page wrapper. Circular (50%) used for carousel pagination dots. Primary-action buttons (search 'Suche', 'Zu den Standorten') render with squared/0px corners, creating a deliberate contrast between rounded chips and rectangular CTAs.

shadows.uses: elevated white cards (search card, teaser cards, news/event cards) over the warm-grey ground
shadows._provenance: approximate; observed on the floating search card and content cards. Soft, low, diffuse.

patterns.name: hero-with-image
patterns.evidence: full-bleed scene7 photo (1440x868) with an uppercase watermark headline and an overlapping white search card

patterns.name: search-first-hero
patterns.evidence: primary hero affordance is a search box ('Stichwort...') + quick-link pill row, not a marketing CTA

patterns.name: map-locator
patterns.evidence: 'Hirslanden in Ihrer Naehe' Switzerland map with location pins + copy + 'Zu den Standorten' CTA

patterns.name: quicklink-tile-grid
patterns.evidence: icon tiles on primary-tint background (Kliniksuche, Jobs und Karriere, Internationale Patienten, Behandlungen ABC...)

patterns.name: teaser-card-3up
patterns.evidence: 'Hirslanden-Gruppe' three image+headline+blurb cards (Babygalerie, Fuer alle Folgen des Lebens, Hirslanden Healthline)

patterns.name: news-list
patterns.evidence: 'News & Mitteilungen' eyebrow-tagged article rows with clinic attribution

patterns.name: event-list-with-date-chip
patterns.evidence: 'Veranstaltungen' rows with a large day-number date chip (25, 01, 02)

patterns.name: cta-band
patterns.evidence: full-width Hirslanden-blue 'Hirslanden Blog' band with white headline + 'Weiterlesen' button

patterns.name: footer-mega
patterns.evidence: multi-column footer (Quick Links, Leistungsangebot, Ueber uns) + emergency number 144 in red

patterns.name: carousel
patterns.evidence: 5-dot pagination beneath the map/hero region (slick slider)

primary._provenance: search 'Suche' button, 'Zu den Standorten', 'Weiterlesen'. Squared corners — sits in deliberate contrast to the 18px pill chips.

secondary._provenance: the quick-link pill chips under the search box (Jobs, Aerztesuche, Baby-Galerie, Sponsoring-Anfragen).

cards._provenance: white content cards (teaser/news/event) and the floating search card, elevated over the warm-grey ground with a soft shadow. Corners read as square/near-square on cards.

inputs._provenance: the hero search input ('Stichwort...') paired with the blue search button inside an 18px-radius white search-box container.

systemComponents.name: site-header
systemComponents._provenance: Header: Hirslanden wordmark (left) + primary nav (Kliniken, Aerzte, Fachgebiete) + a search affordance and a hamburger/menu toggle (right) + a utility bar (Kontakt, Medien, FR/EN language switch). Single-page crawl, so detection is home-only (the >=3-page threshold cannot apply under --single).

systemComponents.name: site-footer
systemComponents._provenance: Footer: group blurb (16 Kliniken, ueber 300 Zentren, ueber 3000 Aerzte), social row, multi-column link mega-menu (Quick Links / Leistungsangebot / Ueber uns), copyright (c) Hirslanden-Gruppe 2026, legal links, and a prominent red emergency number (Notfallnummer 144).

iconFont.sourceCss: @font-face { font-family: 'Icons'; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; src: url('frontend-min/resources/font/icons.woff?v=1.0.0') format('woff'); }
iconFont._provenance: An icon font named 'Icons' is declared in @font-face and fetched (saved to assets/fonts/icons-a388d00e.woff). The site has many inline SVGs too, so it is a hybrid icon strategy. The iconClass -> codepoint table could not be reliably enumerated under --single (no [class^="icon-"] elements surfaced non-default ::before content at capture time); glyph table left empty rather than fabricated.

heroImage._provenance: Full-bleed hero photo (warm interior, a clinician and a patient in conversation in a bright lounge with a lake/mountain view). Intrinsic 2900x1419, served WebP from the Mediclinic/Scene7 DAM. Selected as the largest visible above-the-fold ; downloaded directly via curl (in-page fetch to the cross-origin scene7 CDN was blocked).

voice.firstParagraph: Die Hirslanden-Gruppe ist in der ganzen Schweiz zu Hause. Sie finden eine unserer Kliniken vom Bodensee im Osten über Zürich, die Zentralschweiz, Basel und Bern bis ganz im Westen am Genfersee.

tone.evidence: Formal Swiss-German Sie-address, reassurance vocabulary ('Vertrauen', 'wir sind für Sie da', 'Ihre Gesundheit steht bei uns im Mittelpunkt'), institutional scale claims (16 Kliniken, 300 Zentren, 3000 Aerzte). Warm but authoritative — a private hospital group reassuring patients.

toneMetrics._provenance: headingsUppercasePercent low (5%): only the h1 hero watermark and a few eyebrow labels render uppercase via CSS; the underlying heading text is mixed-case. headingFrequency empty: single-page crawl cannot satisfy the >=3-page filter.

crossPromo._provenance: Cross-promo detection requires multi-page heading-frequency aggregation; under --single (1 page) it cannot run.
